tagline: We Don't Just Build Pools. We Build Memories.

hero.headline: Chester County's Pool Experts Since 1963
hero.subheadline: Three generations of families have trusted Gritz Pools & Spas to build their backyard retreats. From custom inground pools to hot tubs and full-service maintenance, we've been making memories across southeastern Pennsylvania for over 60 years.
checkmarks: Custom Inground Vinyl Liner & Fiberglass Pools
Full Retail Store with Chemicals & Supplies

services.headline: Everything Pool & Spa Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From building your dream pool to keeping it crystal clear for decades, Gritz Pools handles it all with 60+ years of expertise.

cards.title: Inground Pool Construction
cards.description: Custom vinyl liner and fiberglass pools designed to fit your backyard vision and your budget. Elaborate or traditional, we build it right.

cards.title: Pool Service & Repair
cards.description: From routine maintenance to equipment diagnostics, our expert technicians keep your pool running safely and efficiently all season long.

cards.title: Hot Tubs & Spas
cards.description: Authorized dealer for Nordic, Aspen, and HBA Spas. Find the perfect hot tub for year-round relaxation and hydrotherapy.

cards.title: Openings & Closings
cards.description: Proper seasonal prep protects your investment. We handle spring openings and winter closings so your pool is always ready when you are.

cards.title: Liner Replacement
cards.description: Worn or leaking liner? We restore your pool's appearance and watertight seal with precision vinyl liner replacement.

cards.title: Retail Store & Supplies
cards.description: Visit our Coatesville store for chemicals, accessories, covers, outdoor furniture, and everything you need for pool and spa care.

steps.title: Visit or Call Us
steps.description: Stop by our Coatesville showroom or call to discuss your pool or spa needs. We'll listen to your vision and walk you through your options.

steps.title: Get Your Custom Plan
steps.description: Our team designs a plan tailored to your yard, lifestyle, and budget, whether it's a new build, renovation, or equipment upgrade.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard
steps.description: We handle construction and setup with care and precision. Then we're here for service, supplies, and support for years to come.

about.label: About Gritz Pools & Spas
about.headline: Chester County's #1 Pool & Spa Store Since 1963
about.description: Founded by Henry Gritz over 60 years ago, Gritz Pools & Spas has grown from a local pool shop into southeastern Pennsylvania's most trusted full-service pool company. We build custom inground pools, sell and service hot tubs, stock a complete retail store, and provide expert maintenance year-round. Our customers come back for decades because we treat every backyard like our own.

features.title: Family-Owned Since 1963
features.description: A multi-generational family business with deep roots in Chester County. We've been building trust and pools for over 60 years.

features.title: Everything Under One Roof
features.description: Construction, service, maintenance, and a fully stocked retail store. One company for every pool and spa need you'll ever have.

features.title: Authorized Top-Brand Dealer
features.description: We carry and service the best names in the industry: Hayward, Nordic Spas, Imagine Pools, Merlin, and more.

pricing.headline: Honest Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: We provide straightforward estimates and stick to them. Every quote is tailored to your project so you know exactly what to expect before we break ground.

guarantee.headline: Our 60-Year Promise to You
guarantee.description: We've been building pools and earning trust since 1963. If you're not completely satisfied with our work, we'll make it right. That's not just a guarantee, it's how we've stayed Chester County's go-to pool company for over six decades.

faqs.question: What types of inground pools do you build?
faqs.answer: We specialize in both vinyl liner and fiberglass inground pools. Whether you want an elaborate custom backyard design or a straightforward traditional pool, we have options that fit every budget and yard size.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Coatesville, West Chester, Oxford, Reading, Lancaster, and the surrounding communities across Chester County, Berks County, and southeastern Pennsylvania.

faqs.question: Do you service pools you didn't build?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our service technicians work on all makes and models. We handle repairs, maintenance, openings, closings, liner replacements, and equipment upgrades for any pool.

faqs.question: What hot tub brands do you carry?
faqs.answer: We're an authorized dealer for Nordic Hot Tubs, Aspen Spas, and HBA Spas. Visit our Coatesville showroom to see models in person and find the perfect fit for your home.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a new pool?
faqs.answer: Most inground pool projects take 4 to 8 weeks depending on the design, permits, and weather. We'll give you a realistic timeline during your consultation and keep you informed at every stage.

testimonials.name: Kay R.
testimonials.text: I have been a loyal customer since 1976 under original owner Henry Gritz. They have always provided excellent service for chemicals, maintenance, filter replacement, and liner service. I have complete confidence in their expertise.

testimonials.name: Kristine D.
testimonials.text: We have used Gritz Pools for our pool installation in 2005, liner replacement in 2012, and our second pool installation in 2018. Mark, Robert, and Patti have always provided excellent communication, even during challenging weather conditions.

testimonials.name: Joe S.
testimonials.text: An amazing company -- trusting, honest, and friendly. The customer service is spot on. The pool builders are precise, patient, and take pride in their work.

contact.headline: Let's Talk About Your Pool
contact.subtitle: Whether you're dreaming of a new pool, need service on an existing one, or just want to browse our retail store, we'd love to hear from you.
benefits: Free consultations for new pool projects

footer.description: Chester County's #1 Pool & Spa Store and Builder since 1963. Building memories for families across southeastern Pennsylvania for over 60 years.
footer.service_area: Serving Coatesville, West Chester, Oxford, Reading, Lancaster, Chester County, Berks County, and surrounding areas in southeastern Pennsylvania.
